instruction:
Define a macro that eliminates this repetitive pattern:
(pop-last-preprocessor-directive-token directive-token-list directive-symbol)

Issue: Macro call that should be transformed by pop-last-preprocessor-directive-token
original_failure_log_excerpt:
ERROR: The function COMMON-LISP-USER::DSYM_ is undefined.
